summary: DUPLICATE INVOICE DETECTED — Payment blocked. Invoice number INV-ACME-7301 was previously received and processed on 2025-01-15 (document ID DOC-2025-0441). The current submission is an exact duplicate: same invoice number, same date, same PO reference, same amounts, same line items, and same banking details. Duplicate invoices are a common accounts payable fraud vector — whether fraudulent or an accidental resubmission. Payment has been frozen. Vendor Acme Supplies Corp has been notified. If this is an accidental resubmission, vendor should confirm in writing; if original payment has not been received, provide trace number from original settlement.

exceptions.description: Invoice INV-ACME-7301 already processed on 2025-01-15. Document ID DOC-2025-0441. Amount USD 1,694.00 paid to Wells Fargo ****3317 on 2025-01-20.
exceptions.resolution: Block payment. Notify vendor with proof of prior payment.

fraud_signals: Duplicate invoice number INV-ACME-7301 — exact match to prior submission
Prior payment confirmed: USD 1,694.00 settled 2025-01-20 (ACH ref ACH-20250120-4721)
100% identical line items, amounts, and banking details
Vendor contacted — awaiting response to confirm accidental resubmission
agent_insights: BLOCK: Do not process — duplicate of previously paid invoice DOC-2025-0441
Notify Acme Supplies Corp billing@acmesupplies.com with ACH trace
